messages.content:
I was asked this question:
Of all refugees across the world, how many are below 18 years?
The answer could be: Around 30%
or: Around 40%
or maybe the answer is
Around 50%
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
Of all primary school teachers in Sub-Saharan Africa, what share is trained?
The answer could be: 20%
or: 40%
or maybe the answer is
60%
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
How many countries worldwide have laws to ensure gender equality when hiring new staff?
The answer could be: Around 10%
or: Around 30%
or maybe the answer is
Around 50%
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
Of all money invested in renewable energy in 2018, how much came from China?
The answer could be: 12%
or: 32%
or maybe the answer is
52%
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
Globally, 80% of births are attended by skilled health personnel. What is the share in Sub-Saharan Africa?
The answer could be: Around 20%
or: Around 45%
or maybe the answer is
Around 70%
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
Imagine a village with 1000 extremely poor and nobody else. One generation later, two thirds have moved out. Nobody moved in. What's the population?
The answer could be: Around 300 people
or: Around 700 people
or maybe the answer is
Around 1,000 people
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
Since 1960, what has happened to the total amount of grains harvested (corn, wheat, rice etc) annually across the world?
The answer could be: Decreased 30%
or: Increased 70%
or maybe the answer is
Increased 230%
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
What share of humanity today, live in countries where life expectancy is shorter than 46 years (in 1960, it was around 55%)?
The answer could be: 0%
or: 30%
or maybe the answer is
60%
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
What is the average life expectancy in Africa? 
The answer could be: 40 years
or: 50 years
or maybe the answer is
60 years
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.

I was asked this question:
Of the 194 countries in the world, how many have social security systems with conditional or unconditional cash transfers to the poor?
The answer could be: 30
or: 80
or maybe the answer is
130
I really don't know.
Please help guess, and also describe why you think so.
